name: kaseya-bms-mcp
description: The first dedicated CLI and MCP server for Kaseya BMS - the full PSA surface plus offline sync, full-text search, and the queue, contract-burn, and unbilled-revenue analytics the web grid can't compute.

kaseya_bms_bearer_auth.title: KASEYA_BMS_BEARER_AUTH
kaseya_bms_bearer_auth.description: Optional. Sets KASEYA_BMS_BEARER_AUTH for the Kaseya BMS MCP server.

kaseya_bms_token.title: KASEYA_BMS_TOKEN
kaseya_bms_token.description: Optional. Sets KASEYA_BMS_TOKEN for the Kaseya BMS MCP server.
